title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!
